creator: asami@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


Thanks, patch is applied.  I didn't use your PLIST.tmpl -> PLIST hack 
though, this is not the only port that doesn't do it "right" when the 
user changes something from the default and having the packing lists 
called "PLIST" is quite essential at times during managing the tree. 

By the way, these ports are set IS_INTERACTIVE, but it's only because 
it needs to add the "wnn" user.  There are several ports that does 
this automatically (e.g., net/cvsup-mirror) via the pw program, can 
you take a look?  I'd love to have the users be able to build and 
pkg_add these ports without manual intervention.  (Right now itonly 
prints a message and exits from pkg/REQ if the user doesn't exist....)
